name: Brownie Peanut Butter Bites
recipeIngredient: 48 Mini Chocolate Covered Peanut Butter Cups, (Miniature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine brownie mix, water, oil, and egg. Beat well with a spoon.
3. Fill paper-lined mini-muffin cups about halfway full.
4. Press one peanut butter cup into the batter in each cup.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the brownies are set.
6. Cool completely.
Yield: 40-48 pieces.
